$description: Plannivo brand colors. Extracted verbatim from tailwind.config.js, src/main.jsx (Ant Design ConfigProvider theme) and src/index.css (:root vars + component styles). Hex values are authoritative; the 'note' records where each comes from.

primary.note: Antd colorPrimary + colorInfo; --brand-primary. The Plannivo blue. (Tailwind blue-500 / sky-500)

primaryActive.note: Antd Button colorPrimaryActive; start of the signature primary gradient. (blue-600)

sky.note: End of the primary gradient; bright secondary accent. (sky-400)

cyan.note: Tailwind custom color 'duotone-blue' — the kite-brand cyan accent.

antrasit.note: Tailwind custom color 'antrasit' — brand charcoal, used for headings/labels/icons.

accentTeal.$note: Secondary teal palette used on the public form-builder / lead-capture surfaces only. Use sparingly; brand.primary is the default action color.

neutral.$note: Tailwind slate scale — the app's only neutral family. Light surfaces only.
